allow: Bash(node -e "const { Board } = require\('./utils/chess-engine/board'\); const b = new Board\('4k4/9/3R1R3/9/9/9/9/9/9/4K4 r'\); console.log\(b.grid[0].map\(\(x,i\)=>x||'.'\).join\(''\)\); console.log\(b.grid[1].map\(\(x,i\)=>x||'.'\).join\(''\)\); console.log\(b.grid[2].map\(\(x,i\)=>x||'.'\).join\(''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const { Board } = require\('./utils/chess-engine/board'\); const { isLegalMove, isCheck } = require\('./utils/chess-engine/game-state'\); const b = new Board\('4k4/9/3R1R3/9/9/9/9/9/9/4K4 r'\); console.log\('isCheck:', isCheck\(b,'b'\)\); console.log\('kingPos:', [0,4]\); for\(let r=0;r<10;r++\)for\(let c=0;c<9;c++\){const p=b.grid[r][c]; if\(p&&p===p.toUpperCase\(\)\){const ok=isLegalMove\(b,[r,c],[0,4]\); if\(ok\) console.log\('attacker:',r,c,p\);}}")

Bash(node -e "const { Board } = require\('./utils/chess-engine/board'\); const { isCheck, isCheckmate, getAllLegalMoves } = require\('./utils/chess-engine/game-state'\); const b = new Board\('4k4/9/3R1R3/9/9/9/9/9/9/4K4 r'\); const moves = getAllLegalMoves\(b,'b'\); console.log\('moves for black:', moves.length\); for\(const m of moves\){ const clone = new Board\(b.fen\); clone.movePiece\(m.from,m.to\); const c = isCheck\(clone,'b'\); console.log\(m.from,'->',m.to,': check=',c\); } console.log\('isCheckmate:', isCheckmate\(b,'b'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const { Board } = require\('./utils/chess-engine/board'\); const { isCheck, isCheckmate, getAllLegalMoves } = require\('./utils/chess-engine/game-state'\); const b = new Board\('4k4/9/9/9/9/9/9/9/4R4/4K4 r'\); const moves = getAllLegalMoves\(b,'b'\); console.log\('moves for black:', moves.length\); for\(const m of moves\){ const clone = new Board\(b.fen\); clone.movePiece\(m.from,m.to\); const c = isCheck\(clone,'b'\); console.log\(m.from,'->',m.to,': check=',c\); } console.log\('isCheckmate:', isCheckmate\(b,'b'\)\);")
